label: Interhour of the Sixth Hour
description: The Interhour of the Sixth Hour (Mezhduchasiye) is a brief interstitial office appended to the Sixth Hour in monastic practice. It consists of three psalms, the Trisagion, a troparion of the day, and a Theotokion proper to this hour.

sections.label: Fixed Psalmody
sections.notes: The Interhour of the Sixth Hour appoints Psalms 60, 61, and 62 (LXX).

items.label: Psalm 60 (LXX) — Hear my cry, O God
Psalm 61 (LXX) — Shall not my soul be subjected unto God?
Psalm 62 (LXX) — O God, my God, early do I seek Thee

sections.label: Troparia
sections.notes: The troparion of the day followed by the Theotokion of the Interhour of the Sixth Hour.

items.label: Troparion of the Day
items.note: Variable troparion: resolved via Menaion resolver or weekday-theme rubric by HorologionEngine.

items.label: Theotokion of the Interhour of the Sixth Hour
Dismissal
items.text:
Through the prayers of our holy fathers, Lord Jesus Christ our God, have mercy on us and save us.
Amen.
